enhanced_template_analysis.title: Enhanced Cook County (Illinois) Template Analysis
enhanced_template_analysis.purpose: Document structural and interactive enhancements beyond standard county pages

structure: resource-item__meta with phone and website links
standard_template.mobile_behavior: Basic responsive - phone/website links visible, no accordions

structure: resource-item__meta with phone and website links
enhanced_template.mobile_behavior: Advanced - accordions, smooth transitions, active pill tracking

detail_toggle.behavior: Click toggles .open class and .detail-open on adjacent .resource-item__detail
detail_toggle.keyboard_support: Enter or Space key triggers click

detail_container.toggle_class: detail-open (adds this when expanded on mobile)

content_types: HTML lists (ul > li with eligibility items)

detail_divider.used_for: Visual separation between sections (e.g., eligibility and documents)

types.meaning: Waitlist closed or not currently accepting applications

status_badges.usage:
Placed before status text: 🔄 Rolling
Apply anytime...

apply_methods_section.styling: Buttons with secondary styling, flex layout

resource_item__detail.mobile_display: display: none; (hidden by default on small screens)

detail_toggle.display: none; (hidden on desktop, shown on mobile < 768px)

transitions.detail_open_animation: max-height or opacity transition when detail-open class added/removed

event_listeners.action: Toggle .open on toggle and .detail-open on detail

feature_1_accordion_toggle.insertion: Insert toggle before detail element in DOM

initialization.collect_sections: Find corresponding DOM elements by id

logic: Find section with highest offsetTop that is still <= scrollY
Add .active class to pill matching active section

code_snippets.accordion_initialization: var details = document.querySelectorAll('.resource-item__detail'); details.forEach(function(detail) { var toggle = document.createElement('div'); toggle.className = 'detail-toggle'; toggle.innerHTML = 'View Program Details▾'; toggle.setAttribute('role', 'button'); toggle.setAttribute('tabindex', '0'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); toggle.addEventListener('click', function() { var isOpen = this.classList.toggle('open'); detail.classList.toggle('detail-open'); this.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isOpen ? 'true' : 'false'); this.querySelector('span:first-child').textContent = isOpen ? 'Hide Program Details' : 'View Program Details'; }); detail.parentNode.insertBefore(toggle, detail); });
code_snippets.pill_scroll_tracking: var pills = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-qa-pill'); var sections = []; pills.forEach(function(pill) { var id = pill.getAttribute('href').replace('#', ''); var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) sections.push({ id: id, el: el, pill: pill }); }); function updateActivePill() { var scrollY = window.scrollY + 120; var active = null; sections.forEach(function(s) { if (s.el.offsetTop <= scrollY) active = s; }); pills.forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); }); if (active) active.pill.classList.add('active'); } window.addEventListener('scroll', function() { clearTimeout(scrollTimer); scrollTimer = setTimeout(updateActivePill, 50); }, { passive: true });

semantic_html.link_buttons: Using native <a> elements for apply methods

mobile_quick_access_pill_bar.placement: Above resource sections (likely sticky or fixed on scroll)
mobile_quick_access_pill_bar.visibility: Shown on mobile only (likely hidden on desktop via CSS media query)
mobile_quick_access_pill_bar.active_state: Updates based on scroll position - whichever section is in viewport

interaction.scroll: Pill indicator updates to show current section

state_specific_customization_example.use_case: Show how Cook County (Illinois) enhanced template can be adapted for other states
state_specific_customization_example.all_customizations_are_content: No hardcoded state-specific CSS - all styling is reusable

file_size_and_performance.javascript_overhead: Minimal - ~2-3 KB of script for accordions and pill tracking
file_size_and_performance.css_overhead: Added ~1-2 KB for detail-block and mobile styles
optimization_notes: Could defer accordion initialization until first interaction
Could use CSS-only accordion without JavaScript (checkbox hack)
Detail block content should be lazy-loaded or hidden until expanded on mobile

requires: ES6 support (arrow functions optional, can use traditional function syntax)
CSS Grid support (IE 11 has limited support)
fallback_considerations: Older browsers will see details expanded by default (acceptable degradation)
Mobile pill tracking will work but may not be smooth on older devices

implementation_recommendations.phase_1_html_content: Add detail blocks and structure to existing templates without JavaScript
implementation_recommendations.phase_2_css: Add media queries and styling for accordion collapse/expand
implementation_recommendations.phase_3_javascript: Add accordion toggle and pill tracking JavaScript
implementation_recommendations.phase_4_optimization: Minify, test performance, optimize for mobile

desktop_browser: All detail blocks visible by default
tablet_browser: Transition between expanded details (visible) and collapsed (toggles)
mobile_browser: Mobile pill bar appears and tracks scroll
Smooth scroll to section on pill click
accessibility_testing: Keyboard navigation works (Tab to toggle, Enter/Space to expand)
